nt":0,"listen_duration":112567,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":209359,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2682},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525795062687384344","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前更新两百章，已全部看完，总体来说挺好的。主角该怂的时候怂，该苟的时候苟，该硬的时候硬，剧情顺畅，从孙悟空上天前开始展开，后面穿插天界和下界两线，主角明确的知道自己想要的是什么，虽然大部分写修炼，但读起来却不会枯燥。群像性格描写也各有特点，比较符合主流大众的认知。按照目前的情况来看，这本书后面如果能一直保持水准，9分以上是没问题的。值得一看！","text_exts":[{"e":54,"s":51,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774256276E3A4742F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227525795062687384344%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227506411505437379608%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752241301,"group_id":"7506411505437379608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢评论自己对看过小说的真实感受。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N49MIOVlpz2hwUYCZJfiSjE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"104557187875","user_name":"怎么荔枝啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104557187875","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506411505437379608","book_info":{"abstract":"重生穿越到西游世界。
